ch12_start.text: With auxiliary power restored, you return to the upper decks. But something is wrong. Maya is missing. The vents where she was hiding have been torn open from the inside.

ch12_search.text: You follow a trail of small, muddy footprints leading away from the vents. The corridors here are pitch black, illuminated only by patches of glowing, bioluminescent spores growing on the walls.

ch12_trail.text: The footprints lead to a desolate storage bay. You find Maya huddled in the corner, holding a dirty, torn piece of fabric. She is shaking violently.

ch12_maya_truth.text: 'I was looking for my brother,' she cries. 'He was on the drill team. I sneaked down to the lower decks days ago. The mud... it glowed. It was on my boots.'
ch12_maya_truth.speaker: Maya

ch12_revelation.text: The pieces fall into place. The outbreak wasn't sabotage. It was a tragic accident. Maya, looking for her brother, unknowingly tracked the dormant spores from the quarantine zone straight into the station's ventilation system.

ch12_end.text: You try to comfort her, but the reality is crushing. The enemy didn't break in; it was carried in by a child looking for her family. Now, the station is dying, and Corporate still hasn't answered your distress calls.
